name: The Window of Opportunity
effect: Declare a finite period of strategic advantage. This card is considered urgent.

clauses.name: CLOSING WINDOW CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When this card is played: All stakeholders must act immediately or forfeit the opportunity.

clauses.name: RETROSPECTIVE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the deadline passes without action: A new window of opportunity is identified.

clauses.name: PRECISION EFFECT
clauses.rule: If a decision is made under this card's pressure: The decision is considered well-timed, regardless of outcome.
